summary: Iteration 54: Zone/Territory System Testing Complete. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed. Zone system, equal department scoring, territory penetration, and visitor tracking all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test leads created with TEST_ prefix for easy identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zone/Territory system fully verified. All 4 Hyderabad zones have 'Agile Healthcare' as operator. All 13 Meril divisions present. Equal department scoring (25pts each) working correctly.

lead_creation_cardiology_equal_to_orthop.details: Cardiology and Orthopedics both score 85+ points with same attributes. Department scoring is equal (25pts each).

lead_creation_ent_warangal_agile_healthc.details: ENT lead from Warangal district correctly assigned to 'Agile Healthcare'.

lead_creation_hyderabad_auto_zone_02.details: Hyderabad district leads auto-detect zone_02 (Zone 02 — Ameerpet/Hitech City).

get_zones_4_zones_agile_healthcare.details: GET /api/geo/zones returns 4 zones, all with operator 'Agile Healthcare'. No Arka/Medisun/Pride references.

geo_detect_returns_geo_data.details: GET /api/geo/detect returns geo data structure (city, region, lat, lon, zone_id, zone_name, district).

visitor_event_tracking.details: POST /api/geo/track accepts page_view and search events successfully.

all_divisions_13_meril.details: all_divisions contains all 13 Meril divisions: Trauma, Joints/Arthroplasty, Spine, Cardiology, Endosurgery, Endo, ENT, Diagnostics, Vascular, Consumables, Sports Medicine, Dental, Orthobiologics.

homepage_loads_tracks_page_view.details: Homepage loads with 'AGILE HEALTHCARE' branding. Visitor tracking hook fires on page load.

lead_capture_modal_all_departments.details: LeadCaptureModal shows all 17 departments including Cardiology, Orthopedics, ENT, Vascular Surgery, Endosurgery, Dental, Diagnostics/Pathology.

frontend_compiles_without_errors.details: Frontend compiles successfully with no errors.

all_departments_score_equally.details: All departments (Orthopedics, Cardiology, ENT, Diagnostics, Vascular, Endosurgery, Dental, Sports Medicine) score 30 points with base inquiry type.

zone_system_verified.zone_02: Ameerpet/Hitech City - 413 accounts, operator: Agile Healthcare (PRIMARY)
zone_system_verified.zone_03: Central City/Old City - 379 accounts, operator: Agile Healthcare

notes: IP geolocation uses ip-api.com free tier - returns US location in preview environment (expected behavior). Zone detection works correctly for Hyderabad-based leads.
